---
title: "References"
subtitle: "Publications that support the LegalIA project"
toc: false
number-sections: false
nocite: |
  @Graff2026IALegal, @LlamasCovarrubias2022Enfoques, @Tellez2026Fundamentos,
  @Tellez2018AnOptimization, @Tellez2017ATwitter, @Tellez2017AAnalysis,
  @Graff2020EvoMSA:Analysis, @Graff2022AData, @Graff2025BoW,
  @Tellez2023Regionalized
---

The following publications by the members of the research team inform the
project's design and support its feasibility: they cover natural language
processing techniques for Spanish, the construction of specialized language
resources, and the regulatory dimension of artificial intelligence in the
legal domain.

::: {#refs}
:::
